GetWATForUser.bceUserId: BCE user ID (required for service account calls; omitted for user identity calls, auto-parsed and overridden by the system)
GetWATForUser.agentId: (Either-or, preferred) Agent ID; takes priority over name if present
GetWATForUser.sessionId: Session ID used to associate the user session
GetWATForUser.durationSeconds: Validity period in seconds; default 3600, min 900, max 86400
